summary: Professional school website for Doon's Public School (Patna) with detailed content for Homepage, About Us, Admissions, Academics, Student Life, and Contact pages, plus Internet Identity login and admin portal; school logo added to navbar and site theme updated to water blue + red palette
architectural_notes: Multi-page school website with professional design and responsive layout
Internet Identity integration for secure authentication of staff and students
Admin portal for content management behind authenticated routes
School name is Doon's Public School, located at Chitragupt Nagar, Kankarbagh, Patna - 20; office hours Mon–Sat 8AM–3PM
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Crop to landscape, remove phone UI chrome (status bar and browser bar) from top and bottom, enhance brightness slightly (IMG_6461.png > campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage with a prominent hero section featuring the school name, tagline, and a call-to-action button. Include a sticky top navigation bar with links to all major sections (Home, About, Academics, News, Contact) and a footer with the school's contact info and social media placeholders.
Create an About Us page that includes the school's history, mission statement, core values, and a staff/faculty showcase section with name, role, and photo placeholder for each member.
Create an Academics/Programs section listing available courses and departments. Each department should display a title, a brief description, and a list of key courses offered.

Implement a News & Announcements section that displays recent news articles or announcements. Each item should include a title, date, short summary, and a 'Read More' link placeholder. Store news items in the backend and expose a query to fetch them.

Create a Contact page displaying the school's physical address, phone number, and email address. Include a contact form with fields for name, email, subject, and message. Store submitted messages in the backend.

Apply a professional, academic visual theme throughout the entire website. Use a clean, authoritative color palette centered on deep forest green and warm gold/cream tones. Use a serif typeface for headings and a clean sans-serif for body text. Layouts should feel spacious with clear visual hierarchy, card-based components, and subtle hover interactions. The style should convey trust, excellence, and community.

Render all generated static image assets (school logo, hero background banner, about page image, and news placeholder images) from frontend/public/assets/generated as elements in their respective sections.

Integrate Internet Identity authentication: add a Login/Logout button in the sticky navigation bar that triggers the Internet Identity flow using the existing useInternetIdentity hook. Show the authenticated user's principal or a display name when logged in.

Create a protected Admin Portal page accessible only to authenticated users (via Internet Identity). The admin portal must include: (1) a News Management section to add new news items (title, date, summary) and view all existing news items, (2) a Contact Messages section to view all submitted contact form messages. Add an 'Admin' link to the navigation bar that is only visible when the user is logged in. Redirect unauthenticated users away from the admin route.

Redesign the visual theme across the entire website with a vibrant, eye-catching color palette. Replace the deep forest green / warm gold palette with a bold, energetic scheme using vivid jewel tones such as electric indigo/violet, bright amber/orange, and crisp white. Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js accordingly. Apply the new palette to navigation bar, hero section, cards, buttons, badges, section headers, and footer. Maintain the serif headings and sans-serif body font pairing but ensure contrast and readability are preserved throughout.

Update the Homepage (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) with the following Doon's Public School content: Hero headline 'Welcome to Doon's Public School!', sub-headline 'Discover your passion, build your skills, and shape your future right here in the heart of Patna.', two CTA buttons labelled 'Explore Campus Life' and 'Apply Today'. Add an About Us snapshot section with the text: 'At Doon's Public School, we believe high school is more than just textbooks. We are a community dedicated to helping you discover what you're good at, supporting you through challenges, and preparing you for whatever comes next.' Add a News & Announcements preview section showing three placeholder items: 'Upcoming Event: Annual Sports Meet Registration is Open!', 'Notice: Term 1 Examination Schedules Released.', 'Highlight: Congratulations to the Debate Team for winning the City Championship!' Add a Student Testimonials section with two quotes: '"Doon's gave me the confidence to lead. The teachers here don't just teach; they actually listen." – Rahul K., Class 12' and '"From the science labs to the football field, there's always something exciting happening here. I've found my best friends at this school." – Sneha P., Class 10'.

Update the footer in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx with Doon's Public School contact details: address '📍 Chitragupt Nagar, Kankarbagh, Patna - 20', phone '📞 [Insert Phone Number]', email '✉️ [Insert Email Address]', and social media icon placeholders (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, YouTube).

Update the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/About.tsx) with the following content: 'Our Story' section with the text about Kankarbagh and the school's founding goal. 'Our Mission' section: 'To empower every student with the knowledge, character, and confidence to succeed in a changing world.' 'Our Core Values' section listing: Curiosity, Respect, Integrity, and Excellence. A 'Message from the Principal' section with the full principal's message: 'Welcome, students! High school is one of the most exciting chapters of your life...' (full text as provided).

Create a new Admissions page at frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx with: Headline 'Ready to Join the Doon's Family?', body copy about the admission process, a 4-step 'Your Application Journey' section (1. Say Hello, 2. Take a Tour, 3. Submit Your Application, 4. Meet & Greet), and a prominent CTA button labelled 'Download Admission Form'. Add an /admissions route to frontend/src/App.tsx and a 'Admissions' link to the navigation bar in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx.

Update the Academics page (frontend/src/pages/Academics.tsx) with the headline 'Learn, Challenge, Grow.' and new body copy about interactive learning. Update the three focus area cards to: (1) 'Science & Tech' – Fully equipped physics, chemistry, biology, and computer labs. (2) 'Humanities & Commerce' – Building critical thinkers and future entrepreneurs. (3) 'Exam Prep' – Special guidance and doubt-clearing sessions to help ace board exams with confidence.

Create a new Student Life & Extracurriculars page at frontend/src/pages/StudentLife.tsx with: Headline 'Beyond the Classroom.', body copy about school life, and four activity cards: ⚽ Sports (cricket, football, basketball at district/state levels), 🎨 Arts & Culture (annual fest, drama club, artistic skills), 💻 Tech & Coding Club (apps, websites, robotics), 🗣️ Debate & Model UN (public speaking, argumentation). Add a /student-life route to frontend/src/App.tsx and a 'Student Life' link to the navigation bar in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx.

Update the Contact page (frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx) with: Headline 'We're Here to Help.', body copy 'Have a question about admissions, subject choices, or school events? Drop us a message or visit us on campus!', address 'Doon's Public School, Chitragupt Nagar, Kankarbagh, Patna - 20', office hours 'Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM'. Update the contact form fields to: Name, Current Class, Email, Your Question, with a 'Send Message' submit button.

In frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replace the current hero section image/background (the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[1]/div[2]) with the uploaded Doon's Public School entrance photo, saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/school-entrance-hero.dim_1200x600.jpg. Display it as an element (or CSS background-image) filling the hero section, with appropriate overlay to keep headline text readable.

Add a Gallery section to frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, positioned after the existing content sections (e.g., after testimonials). The section should have a heading 'Our Campus' and display the school entrance photo (school-entrance-hero.dim_1200x600.jpg) in a responsive grid layout. Include placeholder slots (visually styled empty cards) to indicate more photos can be added later.
In frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx, update the footer phone number to 8541886552 (replacing the current '[Insert Phone Number]' placeholder). The display should read '📞 8541886552'.

Replace the existing logo image in the navbar (at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/nav[1]/a[1]/div[1]/img[1]) with the uploaded school logo saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/school-logo.dim_120x120.png. Display it as an element with appropriate height (e.g., h-10 or h-12) and object-fit: contain so it renders cleanly in the sticky navigation bar.

Update the site-wide color theme in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js to use a water blue and red palette. Use water/sky blue (e.g., #4AAED9 or similar) as the primary color and red (e.g., #C0392B or similar, matching the logo's red) as the accent color. Apply the new palette to: navigation bar background and links, hero section gradient/overlay, primary buttons, card borders/highlights, section header accents, badges, and the footer. Ensure sufficient contrast and readability throughout. Replace the current indigo/amber/cream palette with this new water blue + red scheme.

In frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replace the image element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/img[1] (the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section) with an element sourcing the new asset at /assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg. Use object-fit: cover so it fills the gallery card consistently with other gallery images.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage with school branding, hero section, and navigation
About Us page with school history, mission, and staff info
Academics/Programs section listing courses and departments
News and announcements section
Contact page with address, phone, email, and contact form
Add Internet Identity login for staff and students
Add admin portal for managing site content
Update website theme and color palette to be more eye-catching and vibrant
Populate homepage with Doon's Public School branding, hero headline, sub-headline, CTA buttons, about snapshot, news placeholders, student testimonials, and footer with Patna address
Populate About Us page with school story, mission, core values, and principal's message for Doon's Public School
Add Admissions page with application journey steps and Download Admission Form CTA
Update Academics section with curriculum content, focus areas (Science & Tech, Humanities & Commerce, Exam Prep)
Add Student Life & Extracurriculars section covering sports, arts, tech club, and debate/MUN
Update Contact page with Doon's address, office hours, and updated contact form fields (Name, Current Class, Email, Question)
Replace hero section image with uploaded Doon's Public School entrance photo
Add Gallery section on the Homepage featuring the school entrance photo
Update footer phone number to 8541886552
Add school logo (globe with children, laurel branches, Work is Worship motto) to the navbar
Update site-wide theme to water blue (primary) and red (accent) color palette across navbar, hero, buttons, cards, section headers, and footer
Replace the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section with the uploaded corridor photo (IMG_6461.png), saved as a new asset (campus-corridor.jpg)
